description_long: This is a twin-engine propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a prominent FedEx livery on its wings and body. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with straight wings extending from the lower part of the fuselage, and the engines are mounted on the wings close to the fuselage. The tail section is painted in a deep blue and includes a twin vertical stabilizer (H-tail) design, providing stability and control. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with multiple windows, suggesting a multi-seat arrangement. The landing gear is not visible, implying it may be retractable or not modeled in this depiction. The overall appearance is that of a classic cargo or utility aircraft, suitable for urban air logistics.
description: A twin-engine, low-wing propeller airplane with FedEx branding, featuring an H-tail and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, the FedEx logo, and the twin engines mounted on the wings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two propeller engines, cockpit windows, and the straight, low-mounted wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the tail structure and FedEx branding.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the H-tail configuration, blue tail section, and the span of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
